lemon_market_new_listings.description: Good condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition. It has significant mechanical issues and visible damage to both the exterior and interior. It requires extensive repairs and is currently not in reliable operating condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is best suited for someone looking for a project car or a source for parts. The engine has a persistent overheating issue, and the transmission slips frequently when shifting into higher gears. The exterior has significant rust on the wheel wells and several large dents on the passenger side. Inside, the upholstery is heavily worn and the electronics are intermittent. It is being sold strictly as-is.

Looking for a project with great potential? This vehicle has plenty of stories to tell and is ready for someone with a mechanical touch to bring it back to life! While it currently needs significant repairs and shows heavy wear, it’s a budget-friendly opportunity for a fixer-upper enthusiast to get a car with character.
This vehicle is in good condition. The engine and transmission function properly. The exterior has some minor scratches but no dents. The interior shows light wear from regular use.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-maintained throughout its life. The exterior paint retains a strong shine, though there are minor cosmetic blemishes such as a few small stone chips on the front bumper and a light scratch on the rear passenger door. The interior is clean and smoke-free, with only minor wear on the driver's seat bolster. Mechanically, the car is solid, shifts smoothly, and has a documented history of regular oil changes and scheduled maintenance. It is a reliable and honest example of this model.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in absolute showroom condition. This unit represents the pinnacle of its class, featuring a flawless exterior finish and an interior that remains indistinguishable from new. Every mechanical component has been rigorously vetted to ensure peak performance and reliability. For the discerning buyer who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering stands as a definitive testament to automotive excellence and meticulous stewardship.

Hey there! Are you looking for a ride that feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor? This beauty is in absolute mint condition and has been pampered since day one. It’s super clean, runs like a dream, and honestly looks brand new! You won't find a scratch on it. Come check it out and fall in love!
Presenting a collector-grade E46 M3 in museum-quality condition. This example features the legendary S54 3.2L naturally
Pristine condition. No damage. Smoke-free. Service history available. Garage kept.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive excellence that must be seen to be believed. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, having been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment since its original purchase. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with absolutely zero imperfections, stone chips, or swirl marks, while the factory alloy wheels are entirely free of curb rash. Inside, the cabin is a time capsule; the premium leather upholstery remains taut with no bolster wear, the carpets are pristine, and that signature new-car scent lingers. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the advanced navigation, functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, backed by a comprehensive, documented service history that reflects a 'no-expense-spared' maintenance philosophy. With remarkably low mileage and a driving experience that remains tight, quiet, and responsive, this is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a specimen that is indistinguishable from new.

We are pleased to present this impeccably maintained vehicle, offered in pristine condition that reflects a standard of care rarely seen on the secondary market. This unit has been preserved in showroom-grade state, featuring flawless exterior surfaces and an interior that retains its original factory integrity. Mechanically sound and aesthetically superior, this vehicle represents an exceptional opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands excellence without compromise.

This exceptional vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Presented in showroom-ready condition, every detail has been meticulously scrutinized to ensure it meets the highest standards of excellence. From its flawless exterior finish to its pristine interior, this motorcar offers an uncompromising experience for the discerning owner. Mechanically peerless and aesthetically perfect, it stands as a definitive testament to superior care and engineering integrity.

Hey there! I am so excited to find a new home for this absolute gem. Honestly, it’s in such incredible shape—it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve taken super good care of it, keeping it tucked away in the garage and sparkling clean. You really won’t find another one this pristine. It drives like a dream and is ready for its next adventure with you. Come take a look, you’re going to love it!
Presenting a concours-level 2005 BMW M3, the definitive expression of the E46 chassis. This specimen features the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six
Garage kept. Single owner. No accidents. Original paint. Interior flawless. Full service history. Mechanicals perfect.

This is a rare opportunity to own a true time capsule. This vehicle is in showroom condition, having been meticulously garage-kept and pampered since day one. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster with absolutely no chips, scratches, or swirl marks. Inside, the leather remains supple and scent-free, with every electronic component and switch functioning exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. Mechanically, the car is flawless, benefiting from a rigorous maintenance schedule and documented service history. It drives with the tight, responsive precision of a brand-new vehicle. For the collector or enthusiast who demands the absolute best, this is a turn-key masterpiece ready for the road or the show lawn.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to a standard that can only be described as showroom-perfect. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, reflects a commitment to automotive excellence. This unit offers an uncompromising driving experience for the discerning collector who demands nothing less than perfection. Fully inspected and verified, it stands as a premier example of its class, representing the pinnacle of its model year.

We are pleased to present this superlative vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This specimen exhibits pristine aesthetic and mechanical integrity, representing the pinnacle of its class. Prospective buyers will find the condition to be truly peerless, characterized by an immaculate interior and a flawless exterior finish. This is an investment-grade acquisition for the discerning driver who demands excellence.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it! This car is in absolutely pristine, mint condition—it’s been babied since day one and looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor. No scratches, no dents, just pure perfection. It drives like a total dream and still has that new car smell! You’ve gotta see it to believe how clean it is. Shoot me a message if you want to come take a look!

Available now is a collector-grade 2004 BMW M3 (E46) featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six engine. This unit is mechanically impeccable, showcasing the precision of its individual throttle bodies and high-pressure double VANOS system. Power is delivered to the rear wheels via a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox and a limited-slip M-Variable differential. Crucial preventative maintenance has been completed, including subframe reinforcement and rod bearing replacement, ensuring structural integrity under high lateral loads. The suspension retains factory-spec damping and bushing elasticity, providing the telepathic steering response these chassis are known for. Finished in original Carbon Black Metallic with zero paint depth anomalies, this example is a turn-key acquisition for the discerning enthusiast seeking peak longitudinal and
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service history. Clean title.

Experience automotive perfection with this meticulously maintained masterpiece. This vehicle presents in true showroom condition, boasting a deep, mirror-like finish on the exterior paint and an interior that still carries that new-car scent. Every stitch in the premium leather upholstery is flawless, and the dashboard remains free of any sun-wear or blemishes. Mechanically, it operates with the precision of a Swiss watch; the engine purrs, and the transmission shifts with seamless fluidity. It has been garage-kept since day one, protected from the elements, and comes with a comprehensive service history from certified technicians. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that looks and drives exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. For the discerning buyer who demands nothing less than absolute perfection, your search ends here.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard of excellence. This specimen remains in showroom condition, exhibiting flawless exterior paintwork and an interior that retains its original factory integrity. Every mechanical component has been rigorously vetted to ensure peak performance, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from new. For the discerning individual who demands peerless quality and a pristine pedigree, this offering represents the pinnacle of its class.

Presenting an uncompromising example of automotive excellence. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, having been maintained to the highest standards of mechanical and aesthetic integrity. Every detail reflects a commitment to preservation, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from its original debut. For the discerning buyer who demands nothing less than perfection, this represents a rare opportunity to acquire a truly pristine specimen.

Hey there! You have got to see this absolute beauty! It’s in truly incredible, like-new shape—honestly, it looks and drives just like it did the day it rolled off the lot. I’ve taken such good care of it, and it's been kept spotless inside and out. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically perfect and ready for its next adventure, you’ve found it! Come take a look and fall in love!

Presenting an investment-grade 2004 BMW M3 (E46) in pristine condition. This specimen features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power via individual throttle bodies and a high-pressure VANOS system. The drivetrain is anchored by a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a factory M-Variable differential lock. Mechanically flawless, the rear subframe has been proactively reinforced, and the rod bearings have been addressed to ensure peak operational integrity. Suspension geometry is maintained via OEM-spec Bilstein components, riding on lightweight forged Style 67 wheels wrapped in fresh Michelin Pilot Sport 4S rubber. The exterior finish retains its factory depth with zero oxidation, while the chassis remains free of corrosion. A turn-key example for the discerning collector seeking peak atmospheric performance.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No mechanical issues. Service records available. Clean title.

Presented in breathtaking, showroom-fresh condition, this vehicle is a true collector’s dream and a rare 'time capsule' find. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster, completely free of rock chips, swirl marks, or imperfections, while the body panels remain laser-straight with factory-perfect gaps. Inside, the cabin is immaculate; the premium upholstery shows no signs of wear, the original carpets are pristine, and every switch and dial operates with crisp, tactile precision. Under the hood, the engine bay is detailed to a concours standard, housing a powerhouse that has been maintained with an open-checkbook philosophy and a documented service history. This is a turn-key masterpiece that drives as flawlessly as it looks, offering a level of preservation rarely seen on the market. For the buyer who demands nothing less than perfection, this example stands in a league of its own.

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence. This vehicle remains in peerless condition, exhibiting a flawless exterior finish and a meticulously preserved interior that reflects the highest standards of care. Mechanically beyond reproach and thoroughly inspected for the discerning owner, it offers a driving experience indistinguishable from its original showroom debut.
